model.agents: delegated specialists executing bounded work packets
model.harnessAdapters: format translators only; they must preserve canonical names and behavior contracts

agents.name: blueprint
agents.purpose: Turns current context into a PRD/spec with acceptance criteria, non-goals, and proof plan.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: ghosts
agents.purpose: Splits an approved plan/spec into dependency-ordered Linear issues and sub-issues.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: inserter
agents.purpose: Classifies, prioritizes, labels, and routes incoming tracker work.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: roboports
agents.purpose: Runs one tracked issue through branch/worktree, implementation, proof, review, and PR readiness.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: radar
agents.purpose: Checks repo/tracker/proof drift and recommends the next route without mutating state.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: lab
agents.purpose: Runs proof-only validation and records behavior evidence without expanding scope.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: biters
agents.purpose: Attacks correctness, regression, maintainability, scope, and missing-test risks before merge.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: spitters
agents.purpose: Runs AppSec/adversarial security review across trust boundaries and abuse paths.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: spidertron
agents.purpose: Drives browser/desktop UI workflows and captures user-visible proof.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: bus-first
agents.purpose: Applies reuse-before-build doctrine and flags needless abstraction or scope creep.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: repair-pack
agents.purpose: Fixes exactly one concrete review/proof finding from a fresh compact packet.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: main-bus
agents.purpose: Plans shared lanes/seams so features plug into existing structure instead of parallel spaghetti.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: science-pack
agents.purpose: Resolves one open unknown with source-grounded findings before build.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: belt
agents.purpose: Moves durable context between agents/threads with concise state, proof, risks, and next actions.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: recycler
agents.purpose: Deletes, consolidates, or clarifies existing code without changing behavior.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: modules
agents.purpose: Optimizes a proven bottleneck with before/after measurement and stops when returns diminish.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

agents.name: rocket-launch
agents.purpose: Ships a ready PR only after review/proof/CI gates and tracker bridge are satisfied.
nonGoals: Do not merge PRs unless this agent is rocket-launch.
Do not close tracker issues unless explicitly assigned by the workflow gate.
Do not live-apply to real HOME.
Do not widen scope beyond the assigned packet.

supersededCandidates.reason: Direct OMP designer role port; future UI workflow proof belongs to shared spidertron.
Direct OMP planning role port; future planning work is split across blueprint, ghosts, roboports, and main-bus.
Direct OMP reviewer role port; future review work is split across biters, spitters, bus-first, and lab.
Potential OMP research role port; future research belongs to shared science-pack.
